[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ViewController](../fast-element.viewcontroller/index.html) &gt; [isPrerendered](../fast-element.viewcontroller.isprerendered/index.html)

## ViewController.isPrerendered property

A promise that resolves with `true` after prerendered content has been hydrated, or `false` when the view is client-side rendered.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isPrerendered?: Promise<boolean>;
```
